scripts.build: pnpm --filter ontology-extractor build && pnpm --filter ontology-report build
scripts.test:e2e: pnpm --filter ontology-report build && pnpm --filter ontology-report test:e2e
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter ontology-extractor typecheck && pnpm --filter ontology-extractor build && pnpm --filter ontology-report typecheck
